Artifact Stat

StatFlat health

RarityNormal

Drop weight100
Eligible levelsAny
Approx. type odds5.7%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Flat health is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Metal Scrap10-25
Big Metal Scrap5-10
Alien Alloys1-5

Related Artifact Variants

  • Superior Structural Stabilizer
  • Exceptional Structural Stabilizer
